Ntc And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Pltfs First Set Of Requests
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Paul Gaiser's Motion to Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents To Defendant is granted in part and denied in part. Defendants are ordered to supplement the production that has been made with the job description of each position. Production also shall include the work experience and actual compensation of each person holding each position described since August 2007. While the names of each person are not required, the actual facts related to the relevant employees as sought by Nos. 12 and 13 are required. This order does not require the production of any individual employee's personnel files. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-05-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-19-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2009 Text Ruling
